responses.detail: Added static var _next_sequence counter to DomainEvent and a _generate_event_id() static method that produces IDs in the format '{EventType}-{seq}'. The _init() now auto-generates event_id from event_type + incrementing counter. Added optional p_timestamp parameter (default empty string) — callers with ClockPort access inject the authoritative timestamp, otherwise infrastructure stamps it before persistence. All 5 subclasses (WorldEditedEvent, RuleChangedEvent, AIAssistanceRequestedEvent, AIAssistanceAppliedEvent, SafetyInterventionTriggeredEvent) updated to accept and forward p_timestamp to super._init().

Changed prompt_envelope default from null to PromptEnvelope.new() in AIAssistanceRequestedEvent._init(). Changed moderation_result default from null to ModerationResult.new() in SafetyPolicyDecision._init(). Both now initialize to safe empty value objects, preventing null dereference in downstream consumers.

In GDScript 4.x, mutable default arguments (Dictionary, Array) are NOT shared across calls — each invocation receives a fresh instance. This differs from Python's well-known mutable default argument pitfall. Added an explanatory comment above ToolInvocation._init() confirming this is safe. No code change needed.
